name: Hot & Spicy Chicken^
recipeIngredient: 3 Dried red Szechuan peppers, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook gingerroot, garlic, and peppers in stock over medium heat in a wok or large frying pan.
2. Add chicken, stirring constantly, and cook for 3-4 minutes.
3. Add snow peas, soy sauce, dry sherry, and mushrooms. Continue cooking another 2-3 minutes.
4. Combine cornstarch and cold water in a separate bowl.
5. Add the mixture to the wok and cook until thickened.
6. Add onions and heat through.
7. Serve over brown rice.
